description: Default profile for FR-SR-02 mouse-only acceptance and FR-IN-03. Uses wheel navigation, primary buttons for flags, X1/X2 for archive pipeline steps with double-confirm (FR-IN-05). Hardware without wheel tilt or X3 should expose slideshow scope via in-viewer chrome (implementation).

sort.flagDelete.notes: Short click in viewer flags delete; long-press opens context menu (see design doc).

sort.commitBatchDelete.notes: First press opens FR-SR-03 summary; second X1 within 2s or primary Confirm completes (double-confirm).

sort.undoLastFlag.notes: Triple middle within ~600ms when wheel tilt is unavailable.

slideshow.toggleScope.notes: When OS exposes a sixth discrete button; otherwise use on-screen scope control.

ui.fullscreen.notes: Double-click on viewer chrome / title-safe region; implementation defines hit target.

ui.escape.notes: Primary buttons pressed together within ~50ms; ignored during drag gestures.
